headline: Should Dow’s ESOP Share Shelf and CEO Transition Prompt Reassessment From Dow (DOW) Investors?
summary: In late April 2026, Dow Inc. filed a US$2.31 billions shelf registration for up to 60,000,000 common shares tied to an ESOP-related offering, shortly after reporting first-quarter 2026 sales of US$9,794 million and a net loss of US$533 million, with basic and diluted loss per share of US$0.74 from continuing operations. These results arrived as Dow prepared for a leadership transition to new CEO Karen S. Carter, signaling a period of operational and capital-structure reassessment following...
